_publications._publicationTitle: Local low-dose lovastatin delivery improves the bone-healing defect caused by Nf1 loss of function in osteoblasts.

_contextSnippet: ...Lovastatin (LOVA) treatment blunted this effect in cre-adenovirus (cre)-infected Nf1 flox/flox osteoblasts. The ratio P-ERK:ERK is quantified in the top panel.
details: Used to normalize phospho-ERK measurements, allowing quantification of P-ERK:ERK ratio changes
